properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v1 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v10 v1 v8 v11 v12 v12 v12

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Only You, You alone Are worthy of the glory, Lord And every crown we'll ever wear We lay it down

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We bow our knees, we confess You are Lord all by Yourself You reign alone upon Your throne of righteousness Only You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Who is like the Lord our God Who reigns in majesty? Yeah Who formed the earth and the heavens above The mountains, the deserts and seas?

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Who deserves honor? Who deserves praise? Who is the sovereign King?

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We bow our knees, we confess You are Lord all by Yourself You reign alone upon Your throne of righteousness

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Who is like the Lord our God? Who lifts those of low degree, yeah And who by His grace and faithfulness He calls us His family? Yeah

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And who deserves honor? And who deserves praise? And who is the sovereign King?

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Only You, and You alone Are worthy of the glory, Lord And every crown we'll ever wear We lay it down

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: We bow our knees, and we confess You are Lord all by Yourself And reign alone upon Your throne of righteousness Only You

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: We cry holy is the Lord We cry worthy is the Lamb We cry holy is the Lord We exalt the great I am

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: We bow our knees, and we confess You are Lord all by Yourself You reign alone upon Your throne of righteousness Only You

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: Only You Lord [Incomprehensible] Worthy of all the glory Reign alone upon Your throne Only You
